data.content: Plan: update review skill docs (skills/plan_review.md, skills/implementation_review.md, skills/shipment_review.md) to enforce read-only review behavior: no code/file edits and no git write operations; only knot metadata writes (notes/handoff_capsules/tags) are allowed. If code/git writes are required, reviewers must use reject/failure path to move knot back to prior queue state. Add unit tests in src/skills.rs to assert these constraints are present for plan_review, implementation_review, and shipment_review skill text. Run make install-hooks and make sanity, then commit and push to origin/main.
